MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amir Atahsi Rang for Olivia Brown (Petitioner/Beneficiary). Robert Peterson for and with Manuel Rico (Trustee).

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation (order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation signed in open Court). Mediation is to be completed by July 15, 2011. The Parties are to report to the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by July 22, 2011. The First Accounting Petition and the Petition for Order Removing Trustee, etc. were continued to July 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The Second Accounting Petition on calendar for May 25, 2011 was also continued to July 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order Removing Trustee, Appointing Successor Trustees, For An Accounting And For Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Mar-21-2011 Continued To Apr-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Removing Trustee, Appointing Successor Trustees, For An Accounting And For Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Continued To Mar-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Peterson for and with Manuel Rico (Trustee). Amir Rang and Autumn Engel for Olivia Brown. Some of the Beneficiaries were aslo present.

The Parties agreed to continue the matter to March 21, 2011 for status of Mr. Rico filing an accounting from February 17, 2007 to present which is to be approved by the Court. The matter was continued to March 21, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The accounting is to be filed by March 16, 2011.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
